ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
ISPICKVAL (StageName , "Closed Won") && TEXT(Type) != "Upsell" &&IsPickVal( Competition__c ,"") && $Profile.Name !="System Administrator" && $Profile.Name != "Integration User - API Only" && $Profile.Name != "Integration User" && $Profile.Name !="SW Billing" && $Profile.Name !="SW Billing Extended" && !$User.Financial_Invoice_Management__c && $Profile.Name != "SW SalesOps" && $Profile.Name != "SW SalesOps Extended" && NOT(ISCHANGED( Open_Activity_Count__c ) ) && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Wolves" && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Rank_Ranger" && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Acquired_Company" && MEDPIC_Next_Stage__c = false
&& Not ( ISCHANGED( Quote_Status__c )) && Not ( ISCHANGED( Base_product__c )) && Not ( ISCHANGED( Payment_Frequency__c ))
